label: autoimmune uveitis
definition: An autoimmune disease of eyes, ear, nose and throat that is located_in the uvea.

label: autoimmune optic neuritis
definition: An autoimmune disease of peripheral nervous system that is located_in the neuron projection bundle connecting eye with brain.

label: autoimmune gastritis
definition: An autoimmune disease of gastrointestinal tract that is located_in the stomach.

label: autoimmune pancreatitis
definition: An autoimmune disease of endocrine system that is located_in the pancreas.

label: juvenile ankylosing spondylitis
definition: An ankylosing spondylitis with onset during childhood.

label: drug-induced lupus erythematosus
definition: A lupus erythematosus caused by chronic use of certain drugs.

label: autoimmune glomerulonephritis
definition: An autoimmune disease of urogenital tract that is located_in the renal glomerulus.

label: autoimmune cardiomyopathy
definition: An autoimmune disease of cardiovascular system that is characterized by deterioration of the function of the heart muscle.

label: autoimmune atherosclerosis
definition: An autoimmune disease of cardiovascular system that is characterized by a build up of plaque in the arteries.

label: autoimmune vasculitis
definition: An autoimmune disease of cardiovascular system that is characterized by inflammation of the blood vessels.

label: pemphigus gestationis
definition: A pemphigus that is characterized by blistered skin as a result of self-reactive T and B cells that target BP180.

label: Hirata disease
definition: An autoimmune disease of endocrine system characterized by hypoglycemia caused by antibodies to insulin.

label: N,N'-diphenylthiourea allergic contact dermatitis
definition: An allergic contact dermatitis that has_allergic_trigger N,N-diphenylthiourea.

label: N,N'-diethylthiourea allergic contact dermatitis
definition: An allergic contact dermatitis that has_allergic_trigger N,N-diethylthiourea.

label: cefotiam allergy
definition: A cephalosporin allergy that has_allergic_trigger cefotiam.

label: toluene 2,4-diisocyanate allergic asthma
definition: A toluene meta-diisocyanate allergic asthma that has_allergic_trigger toluene 2,4-diisocyanate.

label: hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis
definition: A lymphatic system disease that is characterized by an expansion of the monocyte-macrophage population and intense hemophagocytosis. It can occur de novo, but more often occurs in the setting of another disorder, usually an infection or a malignancy. A clinical picture of fever, hepatosplenomegaly, lymphadenopathy and peripheral pancytopenia. The morphologic hallmark of this syndrome is the phagocytosis of hematopoietic elements by morphologically normal macrophages.
comment: Xref MGI. MESH:C537250 added from NeuroDevNet [WAK].

label: podoconiosis
definition: An elephantiasis that is characterized by lymphadema located_in the lower extremities caused by a genetically determined abnormal inflammatory reaction to mineral particles in irritant red clay soils derived from volcanic deposits.

label: autoimmune polyendocrine syndrome type 1
definition: An autoimmune polyendocrine syndrome that is inherited in an autosomal recessive fashion, which is characterized by abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes auto-reactivity against endocrine organs.
exact_synonym: Autoimmune Polyglandular Syndrome I | Whitaker syndrome | autoimmune polyendocrinopathy-candidiasis-ectodermal dystrophy

label: autoimmune polyendocrine syndrome type 2
definition: An autoimmune polyendocrine syndrome that is characterized by abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes auto-reactivity against endocrine organs. It is more heterogeneous and has not been linked to one gene.

label: cutaneous lupus erythematosus
definition: A lupus erythematosus that causes skin lesions on parts of the body that are exposed to sunlight.

label: erythema multiforme
definition: A skin disease that is a type of allergic reaction located_in skin, which occurs in response to medications, infections, or illness.

label: Lambert-Eaton myasthenic syndrome
definition: A neuromuscular junction disease that is characterized by an abnormality of acetylcholine (ACh) release at the neuromuscular junction which results from an autoimmune attack against voltage-gated calcium channels (VGCC) on the presynaptic motor nerve terminal.

label: selective IgM deficiency disease
definition: A selective immunoglobulin deficiency disease thatis a dysgammaglobulinemia resulting from decreased levels of immunoglobulin M (IgM) production to roduction of other antibodies.

label: complement factor I deficiency
definition: A complement deficiency that is characterized by recurrent pyogenic bacterial infections that is the result of complement component 3 deficiency.
exact_synonym: C3 INACTIVATOR DEFICIENCY | COMPLEMENT COMPONENT 3 INACTIVATOR DEFICIENCY

label: Hailey-Hailey disease
definition: A pemphigus that is characterized by recurring blistering most commonly occurring in the folds of the skin, particularly the groin and axillary regions, and has_material_basis_in mutations in the ATP2C1 gene that result in loss of adhesion within the skin. Other sites of the body, such as the neck, perianal, and submammary regions, may likewise be affected.
exact_synonym: BENIGN CHRONIC PEMPHIGUS | Pemphigus, Benign Familial

label: adult T-cell leukemia/lymphoma
definition: A T-cell acute leukemia that results_in abnormal increase of lymphocytes, derives_from T-cells, has_material_basis_in human T-cell leukemia virus type 1 (Deltaretrovirus priTlym1), which is transmitted_by sexual contact, transmitted_by contaminated needles used by intravenous-drug users, and transmitted_by breast feeding. The infection results_in_formation_of skin lesions.
exact_synonym: ATLL | Adult T-cell leukemia/lymphoma (HTLV-1 positive) | adult T-cell leukemia

label: proteasome-associated autoinflammatory syndrome 1
definition: A proteasome-associated autoinflammatory syndrome that is characterized by early childhood onset of annular erythematous plaques on the face and extremities with subsequent development of partial lipodystrophy and laboratory evidence of immune dysregulation and that has_material_basis_in homozygous or compound heterozygous mutation in the PSMB8 gene on chromosome 6p21. Digenic forms of PRAAS1 can be caused by heterozygous mutation in the PSMB8 gene and heterozygous mutation in either the PSMA3 gene on chromosome 14q23 or in the PSMB4 on chromosome 1q21.
exact_synonym: CANDLE | JMP syndrome | JOINT CONTRACTURES, MUSCULAR ATROPHY, MICROCYTIC ANEMIA, AND PANNICULITIS-INDUCED LIPODYSTROPHY | NKJO | Nakajo-Nishimura syndrome | PRAAS1 | chronic atypical neutrophilic dermatosis with lipodystrophy and elevated temperature syndrome

label: hereditary lymphedema
definition: A lymphedema commonly located_in legs, caused_by congenital abnormalities in the lymphatic system.
comment: Xref MGI. OMIM mapping confirmed by DO. [SN].

label: mature T-cell and NK-cell lymphoma
definition: A T-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma that has_material_basis_in mature T lymphocytes and natural killer cells.
exact_synonym: NK-T cell lymphoma | mature T-cell and natural killer cell lymphoma

label: anaplastic large cell lymphoma
definition: A non-Hodgkin lymphoma involving aberrant T-cells.

label: diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
definition: A large B-cell lymphoma that is consisting of medium-sized to large B cells with a diffuse growth pattern.

label: mantle cell lymphoma
definition: A B-cell lymphocytic neoplasm due to CD5 positive antigen-naive pregerminal center B-cell within the mantle zone that surrounds normal germinal center follicles.

label: marginal zone lymphoma
definition: A B-cell lymphoma arising from the marginal zone of lymphoid tissues that is characterized by the presence of small to medium sized atypical lymphocytes.

label: peripheral T-cell lymphoma
definition: A mature T-cell and NK-cell lymphoma includes a group of T-cell lymphomas that develop away from the thymus.

label: splenic marginal zone lymphoma
definition: A marginal zone B-cell lymphocyte located_in the spleen comprised of B-cells in place of white pulp.

label: T-cell large granular lymphocyte leukemia
definition: A T-cell acute lymphocytic leukemia that exhibits an unexplained, chronic (greater than 6 months) elevation in large granular lymphocytes (LGLs) in the peripheral blood.
exact_synonym: Large granular lymphocytic leukaemia | Large granular lymphocytic leukemia | T-cell large granular lymphocyte leukaemia

label: secondary progressive multiple sclerosis
definition: A multiple sclerosis that is characterized by a worsening of disability, rather than by relapses followed by recovery, which progressively worsens until a steady progression of disability replaces the cycles of attacks.

label: primary progressive multiple sclerosis
definition: A multiple sclerosis that is characterized by steady worsening of neurologic functioning, without any distinct relapses or periods of remission. The rate of progression may vary over time, with occasional plateaus or temporary improvements, but the progression is continuous.

label: progressive relapsing multiple sclerosis
definition: A multiple sclerosis that is characterized by steadily worsening symptoms and attacks during periods of remission with disease progression from the onset.

label: follicular lymphoma
definition: A B-cell lymphoma that is characterized as an indolent non-Hodgkin's lymphoma and has_material_basis_in follicle center B-cells (centrocytes and centroblasts).

label: extranodal marginal zone lymphoma of mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue
definition: A marginal zone B-cell lymphoma that has_material_basis_in mucosal tissue involved in antibody production.
exact_synonym: MALT lymphoma | MALT lymphoma of the dura | mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue lymphoma

label: tonsil squamous cell carcinoma
definition: A tonsil cancer that has_material_basis_in squamous cells.

label: autoinflammatory disease
definition: A primary immunodeficiency disease that is characterized by the activation of innate immune cells without an infection or injury being present, thus kickstarting the release of cytokines and other immune responses, causing fever and inflammation.

label: immunodeficiency 113
definition: A primary immunodeficiency disease that is characterized by recurrent infections and usually show features of autoimmunity and autoinflammation, such as hemolytic anemia, thrombocytopenia, hepatosplenomegaly, leukocytosis, neutrophilia, and elevated acute phase reactants, and that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the ARPC5 gene on chromosome 1q25.

label: C1 inhibitor deficiency
definition: A complement deficiency that is a functional deficiency in the complement component C1 inhibitor leading to hereditary angioedema (HAE) involving swelling due to leakage of fluid from blood vessels into connective tissue.

label: autoimmune disease of central nervous system
definition: An autoimmune hypersensitivity disease located_in the central nervous system.

label: autoimmune disease of endocrine system
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system resulting in production of antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the endocrine system.

label: CD3zeta deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that affects the development and function of T cells.

label: janus kinase-3 deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that is characterized by severe cell-mediated and antibody-mediated immunodeficiency with recurrent bacterial, viral, and fungal infections, develops_from janus kinase-3 deficiency, and has_material_basis_in autosomal recessive inheritance of mutation in the JAK3 gene of chromosome 19p13.11, responsible for normal differentiation and maturation of B and T immune cells.

label: MHC class I deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that is characterized by recurrent bacterial, viral, and fungal infections, especially of the lung, and sterile necrotizing granulomas of the skin, develops_from deficiency or decreased surface expression of MHC Class I, has_material_basis_in autosomal recessive inheritance of mutation affecting MHC Class I production or expression and frequently involves TAP1 and TAP2 subunits, and is typically asymptomatic in infancy.
exact_synonym: BLS, TYPE I | BLSI | HLA CLASS I DEFICIENCY | bare lymphocyte syndrome type I

label: Omenn syndrome
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in the RAG1 and RAG2 genes on chromosome 11p and the Artemis gene on chromosome 10p. It is characterized by erythroderma, desquamation, alopecia, chronic diarrhea, failure to thrive, lymphadenopathy, and hepatosplenomegaly.

label: recombinase activating gene 1 deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that is the result of a mutation on Chromosome 6 RAG1 gene involving genetic rearrangement of both the T- and B-lymphocyte receptor genes.

label: recombinase activating gene 2 deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that is the result of a mutation on Chromosome 6 RAG2 gene involving genetic rearrangement of both the T- and B-lymphocyte receptor genes.

label: X-linked severe combined immunodeficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that is a X-linked SCID that has_material_basis_in mutations in genes encoding common gamma chain proteins shared by the interleukin (IL-2,4,7,9,16 and21) receptors resulting in a non-functional gamma chain, defective interleukin signalling, minimal or ascent T- and NK cells and non-functional B-cells.
exact_synonym: SCID-X1 | XSCID | gamma chain deficiency | thymic epithelial hypoplasia

label: CD45 deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that is an autosomal recessive disease with T and B lymphocyte dysfunction, due to a large deletion at one allelle and a point mutation at the other. The point mutation resulted in the alteration of intervening sequence 13 donor splice site. The population of T lymphocytes is diminished and unresponsive to mitogen stimulation. The level of B lymphocyte numbers, serum immunoglobulin decreased with age.

label: CD3delta deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that is characterized by the absence of T cells but normal numbers of B cells. CD3D is essential for T cell development.

label: CD3epsilon deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in autosomal recessive mutations in the gene coding for T-cell surface glycoprotein CD3epsilon chain precursors. Patients with CD3epsilon deficiency have a severe defect in the expression of the T-cell receptor CD3-complex.

label: CD3gamma deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in autosomal recessive mutations in the gene coding for T-cell surface glycoprotein CD3gamma chain precursors. Patients with CD3gamma deficiency have a severe defect in the expression of the T-cell receptor CD3-complex. Affected patients have decreased T-cell numbers and function; B cells are variably affected.

label: coronin-1A deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that is an actin regulator when mutated results in SCID through inhibition of thymic egress of mature thymocytes into peripheral lymphoid organs.

label: reticular dysgenesis
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that is the most severe form of SCID and has_material_basis_in mutations in the gene encoding mitochondrial adenylate kinase 2. It is characterized by congenital agranulocytosis, lymphopenia, and lymphoid and thymic hypoplasia with absent cellular and humoral immunity functions.

label: DNA ligase IV deficiency
definition: A combined T cell and B cell immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in a mutation in the LIG4 gene, a DNA ligase, encoding a protein essential for V(D)J recombination and DNA double-strand break (DSB) repair through nonhomologous end joining (NHEJ). Patients present with immunodeficiency and developmental and growth delay.

label: CD40 ligand deficiency
definition: A combined T cell and B cell immunodeficiency that is a X-linked immunodeficiency with hyperimmunoglobulin M (XHIM) affecting isotype switching and is caused by the absence of CD40 ligand which is normally expressed on activated CD4+ T cells. Individuals with this mutation are unable to switch from IgM to IgG, IgA and IgE.

label: immunodeficiency with hyper IgM type 3
definition: A hyper IgM syndrome that has_material_basis_in mutation in the TNFRSF5 gene, resulting in type 3 hyper-IgM immunodeficiency that is characterized by an inability of B cells to undergo isotype switching, an inability to mount an antibody-specific immune response, and a lack of germinal center formation.
exact_synonym: CD40 deficiency | HIGM3 | hyper-IgM syndrome due to CD40 deficiency | type 3 hyper-IgM immunodeficiency

label: lambda 5 deficiency
definition: A B cell deficiency that has_material_basis_in mutations in the IGLL1 gene. Lambda 5 mutations can cause a block in B cell development at the transition between the pro-B cell and the pre-B cell stage.

label: immunoglobulin alpha deficiency
definition: A B cell deficiency that is an autosomal recessive disorder that has_material_basis_in mutation in the IgA (CD79 alpha) antigen receptor.

label: immunoglobulin beta deficiency
definition: A B cell deficiency that is characterized by mucosal infections and autoimmune diseases due to lack of production of immunoglobulin A antibody, and has_material_basis_in autosomal recessive inheritance.

label: agammaglobulinemia 4
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that has_material_basis_in a mutation a homozygous mutation in the BLNK gene on chromosome 10q23.2.
exact_synonym: B cell linker protein deficiency | B-cell linker protein deficiency | BLNK deficiency

label: Good syndrome
definition: A combined T cell and B cell immunodeficiency that is a condition where there is co-occurrence of deficient cell-mediated immunity and benign thymoma.

label: autoimmune disease of exocrine system
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the exocrine system.

label: autoimmune disease of eyes, ear, nose and throat
definition: An autoimmune disease located_in eyes, located_in ears, located_in nose and located_in throat.

label: autoimmune disease of gastrointestinal tract
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the gastrointestinal tract.

label: autoimmune disease of musculoskeletal system
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the musculoskeletal system.

label: autoimmune disease of peripheral nervous system
definition: An autoimmune disease of the nervous system that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the peripheral nervous system.

label: autoimmune disease of skin and connective tissue
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the skin and connective tissue.

label: autoimmune disease of urogenital tract
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the urogenital tract.

label: autoimmune disease of blood
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the blood.

label: autoimmune disease of cardiovascular system
definition: An autoimmune disease that is the abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes your immune system to produce antibodies or T cells against cells and/or tissues in the cardiovascular system.

label: hypersensitivity reaction disease
definition: An immune system disease that has_material_basis_in abnormal immune responses.

label: gluten allergy
definition: A food allergy that develops from an immune reaction to eating gluten, a protein found in wheat, barley, rye and triticale and that is characterized by stomach cramping, diarrhea and gastrointestinal upset and is unrelated to the gluten intolerance.
exact_synonym: allergy to gluten | gluten allergic reaction

label: lymphoma
definition: A hematologic cancer that affects lymphocytes that reside in the lymphatic system and in blood-forming organs.

label: non-Hodgkin lymphoma
definition: A lymphoma that is characterized as any kind of lymphoma except Hodgkin's lymphoma.

label: primary cutaneous T-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma
definition: A peripheral T-cell lymphoma that has_material_basis_in a mutation of T cells.
exact_synonym: cutaneous T cell lymphoma | cutaneous T-cell lymphoma

label: lymphatic system cancer
definition: An immune system cancer that is located_in the lymphatic system and is characterized by uncontrolled cellular proliferation of lymphoid tissue.

label: immune system cancer
definition: An organ system cancer located_in the immune system that is characterized by uncontrolled cellular proliferation in organs of the immune system.

label: heavy chain disease
definition: A hypersensitivity reaction type IV disease that results from a proliferation of cells producing immunoglobulin heavy chains.

label: alpha chain disease
definition: A heavy chain disease that results from an overproduction of alpha antibodies (IgA).

label: gamma heavy chain disease
definition: A heavy chain disease that results from an overproduction of gamma antibody (IgG).

label: mu chain disease
definition: A heavy chain disease that results from an overproduction of mu antibody (IgM).

label: delta chain disease
definition: A heavy chain disease that results from an overproduction of delta antibody (IgD).

label: diffuse alopecia areata
definition: An alopecia areata that involves diffuse loss of hair over the whole scalp.

label: Balo concentric sclerosis
definition: A multiple sclerosis that is characterized by concentric layers of demyelinated tissues, tumor-like lesions larger than two centimeters and symptoms similar to those of a brain tumor.
exact_synonym: Balo disease | Balo's concentric sclerosis | Tumefactive multiple sclerosis

label: lymph node adenoid cystic carcinoma
definition: A lymph node carcinoma that is characterized by a distinctive pattern in which abnormal nests or cords of epithelial cells surround and/or infiltrate ducts or glandular structures of the lymph nodes. These structures are typically filled with a mucous-like material or contain abnormal fibrous membranes.

label: complement component 2 deficiency
definition: A complement deficiency that is characterized by recurrent bacterial infections, has_material_basis_in autosomal recessive inheritance of mutation in the C2 gene.

label: complement component 4a deficiency
definition: A complement deficiency that is characterized by recurrent bacterial infections, caused by C4A deficiency.

label: complement component 4b deficiency
definition: A complement deficiency that is characterized by recurrent bacterial infections, caused by C4B deficiency.

label: complement component 6 deficiency
definition: A complement deficiency that is characterized by recurrent bacterial infections, has_material_basis_in mutation in the C6 gene.

label: complement component 7 deficiency
definition: A complement deficiency that is characterized by recurrent bacterial infections, has_material_basis_in mutation in the C7 gene.

label: type I complement component 8 deficiency

label: breast implant-associated anaplastic large cell lymphoma
definition: A peripheral T-cell lymphoma characterized by development around textured-surface breast implants confined to the capsule.

label: vegetable allergy
definition: A food allergy triggered by a vegetable food product.

label: celery allergy
definition: A vegetable allergy triggered by celery (Apium graveolens).

label: primary biliary cholangitis 1
definition: A primary biliary cholangitis that has_material_basis_in variation at the IL12A locus on chromosome 3q25.33.

label: primary biliary cholangitis 2
definition: A primary biliary cholangitis that has_material_basis_in variation at the HLA-DQB1 locus on chromosome 6p21.3.

label: primary biliary cholangitis 3
definition: A primary biliary cholangitis that has_material_basis_in variation at the IL12RB2 locus on chromosome 1p31.2.

label: primary biliary cholangitis 4
definition: A primary biliary cholangitis that has_material_basis_in variation near the IRF5-TNPO3 locus on chromosome 7q32.

label: primary biliary cholangitis 5
definition: A primary biliary cholangitis that has_material_basis_in variation at the ZPBP2 locus on chromosome 17q12-q21.

label: autosomal recessive chronic granulomatous disease 5
definition: A chronic granulomatous disease characterized by autosomal recessive inheritance that has_material_basis_in mutation in the CYBC1 gene on chromosome 17q25.

label: autoinflammation, antibody deficiency, and immune dysregulation syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease characterized by recurrent blistering skin lesions with a dense inflammatory infiltrate and variable involvement of other tissues, including joints, the eye, and the gastrointestinal tract that has_material_basis in heterozygous mutation in the PLCG2 gene on chromosome 16q23.
exact_synonym: APLAID | autoinflammation and PLCG2-associated antibody deficiency and immune dysregulation

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia with MEF2D rearrangement
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma associated with MEF2D gene rearrangement.

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia with MYC rearrangement
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma associated with MYC gene rearrangement.
exact_synonym: B Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia with MEF2D Rearrangement | B-lymphoblastic leukaemia with MYC rearrangement

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia with NUTM1 rearrangement
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma associated with NUTM1 gene rearrangement.

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia with PAX5alt
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma associated with PAX5 gene alteration, including rearrangements, point mutations, and intragenic lesions.
exact_synonym: B-Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia with PAX5 Alteration | B-lymphoblastic leukaemia with PAX5alt

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia with TCF3-HLF fusion
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma associated with TCF3-HLF gene rearrangement.
exact_synonym: B Lymphoblastic Leukemia/Lymphoma with TCF3-HLF Fusion | B Lymphoblastic Leukemia/Lymphoma with TCF3-HLF Rearrangement | B-lymphoblastic leukaemia with TCF3::HLF fusion | B-lymphoblastic leukemia with TCF3::HLF fusion

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia with ZNF384 rearrangement
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma associated with ZNF384 gene rearrangement.

label: alpha-gal syndrome
definition: An allergic disease that is triggered by galactose-alpha-1,3-galactose (alpha-gal). Sensitization usually results from a tick bite. Symptoms most often appear 2-6 hours after eating mammalian meat but may also be triggered by mamalian-derived products.
exact_synonym: alpha-gal allergy | delayed anaphylaxis to red meat | galactose-alpha-1,3-galactose allergy | galactose-α-1,3-galactose allergy | mammalian meat allergy | red meat allergy | α-gal allergy | α-gal syndrome

label: subcutaneous panniculitis-like T-cell lymphoma
definition: A primary cutaneous T-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma characterized by infiltration of subcutaneous tissue by neoplastic alpha-beta cytotoxic T cells mimicking panniculitis. Homozygous or compound heterozygous mutation in the HAVCR2 gene may contribute to development of this disease, with some evidence of incomplete penetrance.

label: childhood T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia
definition: A childhood acute lymphoblastic leukemia that has_material_basis_in T-cells.
exact_synonym: T-cell childhood acute lymphocytic leukemia | childhood precursor T-lymphoblastic lymphoma/leukemia

label: childhood B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia
definition: A childhood acute lymphoblastic leukemia that has_material_basis_in B-cells.

label: lymphoblastic lymphoma
definition: A lymphoma that has_material_basis_in immature malignant lymphocytes (lymphoblasts) committed to the B-cell or T-cell lineage and located_in primarily lymph nodes or located_in extranodal sites.

label: T-cell childhood lymphoblastic lymphoma
definition: A lymphoblastic lymphoma that has_material_basis_in T-cells and that occurs during childhood.

label: autosomal recessive autoinflammation, panniculitis, and dermatosis syndrome
definition: An autoinflammation, panniculitis, and dermatosis syndrome characterized by neonatal onset of recurrent fever, erythematous rash with painful nodules, painful joints, and lipodystrophy and has_material_basis_in homozygous or compound heterozygous loss-of-function mutation in the OTULIN gene on chromosome 5p15.
comment: In 2024, patients with an autosomal dominant ORAS-like disease were identified. The terms OTULIN-related autoinflammatory syndrome (ORAS) and otulipenia have thus far referred only to this autosomal recessive form, but may become more generally used to mean both inherited forms [JAB, 2025-07-31].

label: relapsed/refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
definition: A diffuse large B-cell lymphoma characterized by less than 50 percent decrease in lesion size with induction therapy or the appearance of new lesions or the appearance of new lesions after attainment of complete remission.

label: adenoid cystic carcinoma
definition: An adenocarcinoma that is characterized by bands or cylinders of hyalinized or mucinous stroma separating or surrounded by nests or cords of small epithelial cells.

label: primary mediastinal B-cell lymphoma
definition: A large B-cell lymphoma that is is characterized by a diffuse proliferation of medium to large B-cells associated with sclerosis.
exact_synonym: Large cell lymphoma of the mediastinum | Mediastinal diffuse large-cell lymphoma with sclerosis | Primary mediastinal clear cell lymphoma of B-cell type

label: nodal marginal zone lymphoma
definition: A marginal zone B-cell lymphoma which morphologically resembles lymph nodes involved by marginal zone lymphomas of extranodal or splenic types, but without evidence of extranodal or splenic disease.

label: atypical hemolytic-uremic syndrome
definition: A complement deficiency that is characterized by mechanical hemolytic anemia, thrombocytopenia, and renal dysfunction.

label: X-linked immunodeficiency with magnesium defect, Epstein-Barr virus infection, and neoplasia
definition: A T cell deficiency that is characterized by CD4 lymphopenia, severe chronic viral infections, and defective T-lymphocyte activation in males and has_material_basis_in X-linked inheritance of mutations in the gene encoding magnesium transporter-1 (MAGT1).

label: IgG4-related disease
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by tumefactive lesions, a dense lymphoplasmacytic infiltrate rich in IgG4-positive plasma cells, storiform fibrosis, obliterative phlebitis, autoimmune pancreatitis, and sometimes elevated serum IgG4 levels affecting various organs.

label: pustular psoriasis 14
definition: A psoriasis characterized by sudden, repeated episodes of high-grade fever, generalized rash, and disseminated pustules, with hyperleukocytosis and elevated serum levels of C-reactive protein that has_material_basis_in homozygous or compound heterozygous mutation in the IL36RN gene on chromosome 2q14.
exact_synonym: acrodermatitis continua of Hallopeau | deficiency of IL-36R antagonist

label: psoriasis 2
definition: A psoriasis that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the CARD14 gene on chromosome 17q25.

label: leukocyte adhesion deficiency 2
definition: A leukocyte adhesion deficiency that is characterized by the absence of Sialyl Lewis X of E-selectin resulting in recurrent bacterial infections, severe growth delay and severe intellectual deficit.

label: hyper IgM syndrome
definition: A hyperimmunoglobin syndrome that is characterized by an immune system that fails to produce normal levels of the antibodies IgA, IgG and IgE but can produce normal or elevated levels of IgM.
exact_synonym: HIGM | hyperimmunoglobulin M syndrome | immunodeficiency with hyper-IgM

label: hyper IgE syndrome
definition: A hyperimmunoglobulin syndrome that is characterized by eczema, distinct facial features, a tendency to experience bone fractures and recurrent bacterial infections of the skin and lungs.

label: agammaglobulinemia 5
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the LRRC8A gene on chromosome 9q34.

label: hyper IgE recurrent infection syndrome 2
definition: A hyper IgE syndrome that has_material_basis_in homozygous or compound heterozygous mutation in the DOCK8 gene on chromosome 9p24.
exact_synonym: autosomal recessive hyper-IgE syndrome 2 with recurrent infections

label: autosomal recessive hyper-IgE syndrome 3 with recurrent infections
definition: A hyper IgE syndrome that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the ZNF341 gene on chromosome 20q11.

label: hyper IgE recurrent infection syndrome 4
definition: A hyper IgE syndrome that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the IL6ST gene on chromosome 5q11.

label: ankylosing spondylitis 1
definition: A ankylosing spondylitis that has_material_basis_in variation in the HLA-B27 allele on chromosome 6p21.3.

label: ankylosing spondylitis 2
definition: A ankylosing spondylitis that has_material_basis_in variation in the HLA-B27 allele on chromosome 9q31-q34.

label: ankylosing spondylitis 3
definition: A ankylosing spondylitis that has_material_basis_in variation in the HLA-B allele on chromosome 2q36.1-q36.3.

label: lymph node benign neoplasm
definition: An immune system organ benign neoplasm that is located_in the lymph nodes.

label: lymph node carcinoma
definition: A lymph node cancer that has_material_basis_in abnormally proliferating cells derives_from epithelial cells.

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma
definition: A B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia that is characterized by the presence of too many B-cell lymphoblasts in the blood and bone marrow.
exact_synonym: B lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma | B-ALL | precursor B lymphoblastic lymphoma/leukemia

label: B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia
definition: An acute lymphocytic leukemia characterized by too many B-cell lymphoblasts (immature white blood cells) in the bone marrow and blood.
exact_synonym: B acute lymphoblastic leukemia | B-cell acute lymphocytic leukemia

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with BCR-ABL1
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma that derives_from B-lymphoblasts and carries a translocation between the BCR gene on chromosome 22 and the ABL1 gene on chromosome 9. It results in the production of the p190 kd or p210 kd fusion protein.
exact_synonym: B-ALL with BCR-ABL1 | B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with t(9;22)(q34.1;q11.2);BCR-ABL1

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma MLL rearranged
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma that is characterized by the presence of lymphoblasts that carry a translocation between the KMT2A gene at 11q23.3 and another gene partner resulting in the production of a KMT2A related fusion protein.
exact_synonym: B lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with t(v;11q23); MLL rearranged | B-ALL KMT2A rearranged | B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma KMT2A rearranged | B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with t(v;11q23.3);KMT2A rearranged

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with ETV6-RUNX1
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma that is characterized by the presence of lymphoblasts that carry a translocation between the TEL gene on chromosome 12 and the AML1 gene on chromosome 21, (p13.2;q22.1). It results in the production of the TEL-AML1 (ETV6-RUNX1) fusion protein.
exact_synonym: B-ALL with ETV6-RUNX1 | B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with t(12;21)(p13.2;q22.1); ETV6-RUNX1

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with hyperdiploidy
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma that is composed of B-lymphoblasts which contain more than 50 and usually less than 66 chromosomes.

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with hypodiploidy
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma that is composed of B-lymphoblasts which contain less than 46 chromosomes.

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with IGH::IL3 fusion
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma that is characterized by the presence of lymphoblasts that carry a translocation between the IL3 gene on chromosome 5 and the IGH locus on chromosome 14, (q31.1;q32.3).
exact_synonym: B-ALL with IL3-IGH | B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with IL3-IGH | B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with t(5;14)(q31.1;q32.3) IL3-IGH

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with TCF3-PBX1
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma that is characterized by the presence of lymphoblasts that carry a translocation between the E2A gene on chromosome 19 and the PBX1 gene on chromosome 1.
exact_synonym: B Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia with t(1;19)(q23;p13.3); E2A-PBX1 (TCF3-PBX1) | B-ALL with TCF3-PBX1 | B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with t(1;19)(q23;p13.3);TCF3-PBX1

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma, BCR-ABL1–like
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma that has a gene expression profile similar to that of B-ALL with t(9;22)(q34.1;q11.2) BCR-ABL1, but lacks that gene fusion.
exact_synonym: B lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma, BCR-ABL1-like | B-ALL BCR-ABL1–like

label: B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma with iAMP21
definition: A B-lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma that is characterized by amplification of a portion of chromosome 21.
exact_synonym: B-ALL with iAMP21 | Intrachromosomal amplification of chromosome 21 (iAMP21)

label: NK cell deficiency
definition: A primary immunodeficiency disease that results from deficiency in the number or function of CD56+CD3− NK cell in peripheral blood.

label: T cell and NK cell immunodeficiency
definition: A primary immunodeficiency disease that involves multiple components of the immune system, including both T cell and NK cell immunodeficiency.

label: limbic encephalitis
definition: An encephalitis that is characterized by subacute onset of short-term memory deficits, seizures or psychiatric symptoms located_in the medial temporal lobes.

label: autoimmune cholangitis
definition: An autoimmune hepatitis that is characterized by primary biliary cirrhosis clinical, biochemical, and histologic characteristics with antinuclear antibody positive sera.

label: antisynthetase syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by myositis, arthralgia, Raynaud phenomenon, mechanic hands, interstitial lung disease, and serum autoantibodies to aminoacyl transfer RNA synthetases.

label: polymyositis
definition: A myositis that is characterized by muscle weakness affecting both sides of your body.

label: Sweet syndrome
definition: A skin disease that is characterized by sudden onset of well defined tender plaques or nodules accompanied by fever, arthralgias, ocular inflammation, headaches and, rarely, oral or genital lesions.
exact_synonym: Acute Febrile Neutrophilic Dermatosis | Sweet's syndrome

label: autoimmune myocarditis
definition: An autoimmune disease of cardiovascular system that is characterized by inflammation of the heart muscle.

label: plasmablastic lymphoma
definition: A large B-cell lymphoma that is characterized by the presence of large neoplastic cells resembling B-immunoblasts which have the immunophenotypic profile of plasma cells.

label: nasal type extranodal NK/T-cell lymphoma
definition: A mature T-cell and NK-cell lymphoma that is characterized by an often angiocentric and angiodestructive cellular infiltrate composed of EBV positive NK/T cells.

label: extrinsic asthma
definition: A chronic asthma that is triggered by an allergen and that is characterized by an immune system overreaction to a harmless substance, such as pollen or dust, with the subsequent release of immunoglobin E (IgE) antibodies.

label: thunderstorm triggered asthma
definition: An allergic asthma that is characterized by acute asthma attacks immediately following a thunderstorm resulting from inhalation of high concentrations of aeroallergens, most commonly grass pollen.

label: pemphigoid
definition: An autoimmune disease of skin and connective tissue that is characterized by subepidermal blistering especially in the lower abdomen, groin, and flexor surfaces of the extremities, creating tense blisters that do not break easily.

label: latent autoimmune diabetes in adults
definition: A type 1 diabetes mellitus that is characterized by a less intensive autoimmune process, highly variable β-cell destruction, different degrees of insulin resistance and heterogeneous titre and pattern of islet autoantibody, sharing features with both type 1 and type 2 diabetes mellitus.

label: pemphigus foliaceus
definition: A pemphigus that is characterized by blistering lesions on otherwise healthy-looking skin.

label: IgA pemphigus
definition: A pemphigus that is characterized by painful and pruritic vesiculopustular eruptions. These eruptions form as a result of circulating IgA antibodies against keratinocyte cell surface components responsible for cell to cell adherence.

label: paraneoplastic pemphigus
definition: A pemphigus that is characterized by painful blisters and denuded areas of the mouth, lips, oesophagus and skin.

label: serum amyloid A amyloidosis
definition: An amyloidosis that is characterized by sustained high levels of inflammatory serum amyloid A protein when inflammation is present in the body.
exact_synonym: AA amyloidosis | Apo serum amyloid A amyloidosis | inflammation AA amyloidosis | secondary amyloidosis

label: familial Behcet-like autoinflammatory syndrome
definition: An autoinflammatory disease that is characterized by characterized by ulceration of mucosal surfaces, particularly in the oral and genital areas and that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the TNFAIP3 gene on chromosome 6q23.

label: autoimmune epilepsy
definition: An epilepsy that is characterized by new-onset refractory seizures along with subacute progressive cognitive decline and behavioral or psychiatric dysfunction.

label: diffuse large B-cell lymphoma activated B-cell type
definition: A diffuse large B-cell lymphoma that is characterized by the expression of CD44, PKCbeta1, Cyclin D2, BCL-2, and IRF4/MUM1 genes.

label: diffuse large B-cell lymphoma germinal center B-cell type
definition: A diffuse large B-cell lymphoma that is characterized by the expression of CD10, BCL-6, A-myb, and LMO2 genes, BCL-2 translocation, and c-REL amplification.

label: high-grade B-cell lymphoma double-hit/triple-hit
definition: A large B-cell lymphoma that is characterized by the abnormal rearrangement of two genes, MYC gene and either BCL2 or BCL6 genes.
exact_synonym: HGBL-DH/TH | High Grade B-Cell Lymphoma with MYC and BCL2 or BCL6 Rearrangements

label: parsley allergy
definition: A vegetable allergy triggered by parsley (Petroselinum).

label: dill allergy
definition: A food allergy triggered by dill (Anethum graveolens).

label: central conducting lymphatic anomaly
definition: A lymphatic system disease that is characterized by dysfunction of the thoracic duct or cisterna chyli, leading to a retrograde flux of lymphatic fluid or abnormal drainage of lymphatic fluid and that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the EPHB4 gene on chromosome 7q22.

label: generalized lymphatic anomaly
definition: A lymphatic system disease that is characterized by abnormal overgrowth of lymphatic vessels with multiple areas in the lungs, pleura, bones and soft tissues leading to lymphatic malformations.

label: mixed phenotype acute leukemia with BCR-ABL1
definition: An acute biphenotypic leukemia that is characterized by blasts that also carry the translocation t(9;22)(q34.1;q11.2) by karyotypic analysis or the BCR-ABL1 translocation by FISH or PCR.
exact_synonym: Mixed Phenotype Acute Leukemia with t(9;22)(q34.1;q11.2); BCR-ABL1

label: mixed phenotype acute leukemia with MLL rearranged
definition: An acute biphenotypic leukemia that is characterized by blasts which carry a translocation between the MLL (KMT2A) gene at 11q23.3 and another gene partner.
exact_synonym: Mixed Phenotype Acute Leukemia with t(v;11q23.3); MLL Rearranged

label: mixed phenotype acute leukemia, B/myeloid
definition: An acute biphenotypic leukemia that is characterized by blasts which express B-lymphoid and myeloid lineage markers but are negative for MLL translocation and t(9;22)(q34;q11.2) translocation.

label: mixed phenotype acute leukemia, T/myeloid
definition: An acute biphenotypic leukemia that is characterized by blasts that express antigens of both T and myeloid antigens.

label: B-cell prolymphocytic leukemia
definition: A prolymphocytic leukemia that is characterized by medium-sized, round lymphoid cells with prominent nucleoli exceeding 55% of lymphoid cells in the blood.
exact_synonym: B Cell Prolymphocytic Leukemia | Prolymphocytic leukemia, B-cell type

label: T-cell prolymphocytic leukemia
definition: A prolymphocytic leukemia that is characterized by the proliferation of small to medium sized prolymphocytes with a mature T-cell phenotype, involving the blood, bone marrow, lymph nodes, liver, spleen, and skin.
exact_synonym: Prolymphocytic leukemia, T-cell type | T Cell Prolymphocytic Leukemia

label: hepatosplenic T-cell lymphoma
definition: A mature T-cell and NK-cell lymphoma that is characterized by the presence of medium-size neoplastic lymphocytes infiltrating the hepatic sinusoids and that originates from cytotoxic T-cells, usually of gamma/delta T-cell type.

label: primary cutaneous gamma-delta T-cell lymphoma
definition: A primary cutaneous T-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma that is characterized by the clonal cutaneous proliferation of activated mature gamma-delta T cells with a cytotoxic phenotype.
exact_synonym: Primary Cutaneous Gamma-Delta T Cell Lymphomas | cutaneous gamma/delta T-cell lymphoma

label: BN2 diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
definition: A diffuse large B-cell lymphoma that is categorized as BN2 with high probability by the LymphGen algorithm. This is based on a combination of genetic features and BN2 DLBCLs often, but do not always, have a translocation involving the BCL6 locus and/or some combination of mutations affecting NOTCH2, TNFAIP3, BCL10 and UBE2A. This subgroup also commonly has mutations due to aberrant somatic hypermutation affecting CD70, which can be coding or non-coding.

label: EZB diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
definition: A diffuse large B-cell lymphoma that is categorized as EZB with high probability by the LymphGen algorithm. This is based on a combination of genetic features and EZB DLBCLs often, but do not always, have hot spot mutations in EZH2 and/or a BCL2 translocation. This class can be further subdivided into two sub-classes EZB-MYC+ and EZB-MYC- using the double hit gene expression signature (DHITsig). This subgroup also commonly has mutations due to aberrant somatic hypermutation affecting IRF8, which can be coding or non-coding.

label: MCD diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
definition: A diffuse large B-cell lymphoma that is categorized as MCD with high probability by the LymphGen algorithm. This is based on a combination of genetic features and MCD DLBCLs often, but do not always, have the most common hot spot mutation in MYD88 (L265P) and/or activating mutations in CD79B. This subgroup also commonly has mutations due to aberrant somatic hypermutation affecting PIM1 and/or ETV6, which can be coding or non-coding.

label: N1 diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
definition: A diffuse large B-cell lymphoma that is categorized as N1 with high probability by the LymphGen algorithm. This is based on a combination of genetic features. Although N1 DLBCLs always have an activating mutation affecting NOTCH1, LymphGen can assign cases with this mutation to other classes, depending on the presence of other genetic features.

label: ST2 diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
definition: A diffuse large B-cell lymphoma that is categorized as ST2 with high probability by the LymphGen algorithm. This is based on a combination of genetic features and ST2 DLBCLs often, but do not always, have missense or nonsense mutations affecting TET2 and NFKBIA. This subgroup also commonly has mutations due to aberrant somatic hypermutation affecting some combination of SGK1, ZFP36L1, SOCS1, HIST1H1E and CD83, which can be coding or non-coding.

label: A53 diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
definition: A diffuse large B-cell lymphoma that is characterized by aneuploidy with TP53 inactivation.

label: EZB-MYC+ diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
definition: An EZB diffuse large B-cell lymphoma that expresses the double hit gene expression signature (DHITsig+) according to gene expression profiling. In addition to the features characteristic of EZB, these cases commonly, but do not always, harbour MYC translocations and DDX3X mutations.

label: EZB-MYC- diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
definition: An EZB diffuse large B-cell lymphoma that does not express the double hit gene expression signature (DHITsig-) according to gene expression profiling. These cases tend to have few MYC translocations or DDX3X mutations.

label: ectodermal dysplasia and immune deficiency
definition: An ectodermal dysplasia syndrome that is characterized by signs of ectodermal dysplasia (sparse hair, abnormal or missing teeth, decrease or absent sudation), typical facial features (protruding forehead, wrinkles under the eyes, characteristic periorbital hyperpigmentation), and immunodeficiency.
exact_synonym: Anhidrotic ectodermal dysplasia with immune deficiency | Ectodermal dysplasia, hypohidrotic, with immune deficiency

label: ectodermal dysplasia and immunodeficiency 1
definition: An ectodermal dysplasia and immunodeficiency that is characterized by onset of recurrent severe infections due to immunodeficiency in early infancy or in the first years of life and that has_material_basis_in hemizygous mutation in the IKK-gamma gene (IKBKG) on chromosome Xq28.

label: ectodermal dysplasia and immunodeficiency 2
definition: An ectodermal dysplasia and immunodeficiency that is characterized by variable features of ectodermal dysplasia (e.g., hypo/anhidrosis, sparse hair, tooth anomalies) and various immunologic and infectious phenotypes of differing severity and that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the NFKBIA gene on chromosome 14q13.

label: Graves ophthalmopathy
definition: An autoimmune disease of eyes, ear, nose and throat that is characterized by upper eyelid retraction, lid lag, swelling, redness, conjunctivitis, and bulging eyes.
exact_synonym: Graves orbitopathy | Thyroid associated ophthalmopathy | thyroid eye disease

label: agammaglobulinemia 2
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that has_material_basis_in homozygous or compound heterozygous mutation in the immunoglobulin lambda-like-1 gene (IGLL1) on chromosome 22q11.

label: agammaglobulinemia 1
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that has_material_basis_in homozygous or compound heterozygous mutation in the mu heavy-chain gene (IGHM) on chromosome 14q32.

label: agammaglobulinemia 3
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the CD79A gene on chromosome 19q13.2.

label: agammaglobulinemia 6
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the CD79B gene on chromosome 17q23.

label: agammaglobulinemia 7
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the PIK3R1 gene on chromosome 5q13.

label: agammaglobulinemia 8A
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that has_material_basis_in heterozygous dominant-negative mutation in the TCF3 gene on chromosome 19p13.

label: agammaglobulinemia 9
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that is characterized by recurrent bacterial infections associated with agammaglobulinemia and absence of circulating B cells and that has_material_basis_in homozygous or compound heterozygous mutation in the SLC39A7 gene on chromosome 6p21.

label: agammaglobulinemia 10
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that is characterized by early-childhood onset of recurrent viral and bacterial infections affecting various organ systems, particularly the sinopulmonary system, and that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the SPI1 gene on chromosome 11p11.

label: agammaglobulinemia 8B
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that is characterized by onset of recurrent infections in early childhood and that has_material_basis_in homozygous loss-of-function mutation in the TCF3 gene on chromosome 19p13.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 1
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the ICOS gene on chromosome 2q33.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 2
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in heterozygous, homozygous, or compound heterozygous mutation in the TNFRSF13B gene, which encodes the transmembrane activator and CAML interactor (TACI), on chromosome 17p11.2.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 3
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in homozygous or compound heterozygous mutation in the CD19 gene on chromosome 16p11.2.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 4
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the BAFFR gene (TNFRSF13C), which encodes the B-cell activating factor receptor, on chromosome 22q13.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 5
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the CD20 gene (MS4A1) on chromosome 11q13.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 6
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the CD81 gene on chromosome 11p.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 7
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in compound heterozygous mutation in the CD21 gene (CR2) on chromosome 1q32.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 8
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the LRBA gene on chromosome 4q31.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 10
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the NFKB2 gene on chromosome 10q24.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 11
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in homozygous mutation in the IL21 gene on chromosome 4q27.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 12
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that is characterized by recurrent infections and associated with hypogammaglobulinemia and that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the NFKB1 gene on chromosome 4q24.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 13
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that is characterized by recurrent bacterial infections, mainly affecting the respiratory tract, and associated with hypogammaglobulinemia and decreased numbers of B cells and that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the IKZF1 gene on chromosome 7p12.

label: common variable immunodeficiency 14
definition: A common variable immunodeficiency that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the IRF2BP2 gene on chromosome 1q42.

label: autoimmune interstitial lung, joint, and kidney disease
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by interstitial lung disease, inflammatory arthritis, and immune complex-mediated renal disease and that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the COPA gene on chromosome 1q23.
exact_synonym: Autoimmune interstitial lung disease-arthritis syndrome | COPA syndrome | autoinflammation and autoimmunity, Systemic with immune dysregulation | systemic autoinflammation and autoimmunity with immune dysregulation 1

label: graft-versus-host disease
definition: An immune system disease that is characterized by recognition by mature donor T cells, that contaminate the allogeneic bone marrow, of the recipient's tissue as foreign, causing a severe inflammatory disease characterized by rashes, diarrhea, and liver disease, and that has_material_basis_in an associated with variation in the interleukin-10 gene (IL10) on chromosome 1q32.

label: lymphomatoid granulomatosis
definition: A lymphoproliferative syndrome that is characterized by overproduction (proliferation) of white blood cells called lymphocytes. The abnormal cells infiltrate and accumulate (form lesions or nodules) within tissues. The lesions or nodules damage or destroy the blood vessels within these tissues.

label: grade I lymphomatoid granulomatosis
definition: A lymphomatoid granulomatosis that is characterized by the presence of a polymorphous lymphoid infiltrate without cytologic atypia. Large lymphocytes are absent or rare. By in situ hybridization, EBV-positive cells are infrequently seen.

label: grade II lymphomatoid granulomatosis
