definition: A primary immunodeficiency disease that results_in skin squamous cell carcinoma located_in skin, associated with a high risk of carcinoma. It is characterized by abnormal susceptibility to human papillomaviruses of the skin and has_symptom lesions on the body.

label: bird fancier's lung
definition: An extrinsic allergic alveolitis which is caused by inhalation of antigens from avian excreta. The disease has_symptom abrupt onset of dyspnea, has_symptom cough, has_symptom malaise, and has_symptom fever, after exposure to antigen.
exact_synonym: Avian hypersensitivity Pneumonitis | Bird-fancier's lung | Bird-fanciers' lung | bird breeder's lung | bird fancier lung | pigeon breeder's lung | poultry worker's lung

label: autoimmune polyendocrine syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease of endocrine system characterized by abnormal functioning of the immune system that causes auto-reactivity against endocrine organs.
exact_synonym: Autoimmune polyglandular failure | Lloyd's syndrome | autoimmune polyendocrinopathy

label: spinal cord lymphoma
definition: A spinal cancer that is located_in the spinal cord and derives_from lymphocytes.

label: selective IgG deficiency disease
definition: A dysgammaglobulinemia that is characterized by isolated deficiency of an IgG subclass, normal total IgG levels, and subsequent increased susceptibility to recurrent infections, atopic disease, and autoimmune conditions.
exact_synonym: Immunoglobin G subclass deficiency | Selective IgG Immunodeficiency | Selective Immunoglobulin G Subclass deficiency | Selective deficiency of IgG | Selective immunoglobulin G deficiency

label: X-linked agammaglobulinemia
definition: An agammaglobulinemia that is that has_material_basis_in a mutation in the Bruton's tyrosine kinase (BTK) gene on the X chromosome resulting in X-linked agammaglobulinemia type 1, which is an immunodeficiency characterized by the failure to produce mature B lymphocytes, and associated with a failure of Ig heavy chain rearrangement.
exact_synonym: BTK deficiency | Bruton agammaglobulinemia tyrosine kinase deficiency | Bruton disease | Bruton's Sex-Linked Agammaglobulinemia | Bruton's agammaglobulinaemia | Bruton's type agammaglobulinemia | Bruton-type agammaglobulinemia

label: adult-onset Still's disease
definition: A rheumatoid arthritis that is characterized by high fevers, rash, sore throat and joint pain.
exact_synonym: adult onset Still's disease | adult-onset Still disease

label: farmer's lung
definition: An extrinsic allergic alveolitis which is induced by the inhalation of spores (Aspergillus sp and thermophilic actinomycetes) in dust from moldy hay or straw. It is characterized by sudden onset, fever, cough, expectoration, and breathlessness.

label: pemphigoid gestationis
definition: A pemphigoid that is characterized by erythematous papules, vesicles, and plaques around the trunk and extremities that develop during pregnancy, particularly during the second and third trimesters, has_symptom pruritis, and has_material_basis_in autoantibodies to the basement membrane, which triggers a complement cascade and attracts eosinophils to the subepidermis.

label: arthus reaction
definition: A hypersensitivity reaction type III disease that is characterized by local vasculitis, has_symptom pain, edema, hemorrhage, or necrosis, and has_material_basis_in deposition of antigen-antibody immune complexes in vascular or serosal walls.

label: hypersensitivity reaction type III disease
definition: A hypersensitivity reaction disease that is characterized by the accumulation of antigen-antibody immune complexes, causing an inflammatory response and injury.

label: lymphadenitis
definition: A lymph node disease that is characterized by an acute or chronic inflammation of one or more lymph nodes.
exact_synonym: Adenitis | Inflammation of lymph node | acute adenitis | acute lymphadenitis | chronic Lymphadenitis | chronic adenitis
comment: This doid includes the acute and chronic forms.[LS]

label: allergic contact dermatitis of eyelid
definition: A noninfectious dermatoses of eyelid that is characterized by eczema, pruritis, or erythematous vesicles or papules of the eyelids, and has_material_basis_in a type IV hypersenstivity reaction to an allergen or irritant.
exact_synonym: Contact and allergic dermatitis of eyelid

label: thymus lipoma
definition: An immune system organ benign neoplasm that is located_in the thymus and derives_from fat cells.

label: Nezelof syndrome
definition: A T cell deficiency that results from the disfunction or underdevelopment of the thymus.
exact_synonym: Nezelof's syndrome | T-cell immunodeficiency with thymic aplasia | TIDTA | thymic aplasia | thymic dysplasia with normal immunoglobulins

label: autoimmune hepatitis
definition: An autoimmune disease of gastrointestinal tract that results_in inflammation located_in liver caused by the body's immune system attacking the liver cells.
exact_synonym: Autoimmune chronic active hepatitis | autoimmune hepatitis with centrilobular necrosis

label: B cell deficiency
definition: A primary immunnodeficiency disease that is caused by a lack of infection-fighting antibody producing B cells (immunoglobulins) or B cells that are not functioning properly.
exact_synonym: B cell (antibody) deficiencies | Immunoglobulin heavy chain deficiency | immunoglobulin heavy chain deletion

label: ovarian lymphoma
definition: An ovarian cancer that arises_from lymphocytes.

label: malt worker's lung
definition: An extrinsic allergic alveolitis which is caused by inhalation of fungal spores of Aspergillus clavatus and Aspergillus fumigatus from moldy barley.
exact_synonym: Malt workers' lung | Malt-workers' lung | alveolitis due to aspergillus clavatus | malt worker lung

label: multiple sclerosis
definition: A demyelinating disease that involves damage to the fatty myelin sheaths around the axons of the brain and spinal cord resulting in demyelination and scarring.

label: relapsing-remitting multiple sclerosis
definition: A multiple sclerosis that is characterized by relapse (attacks of symptom flare-ups) followed by remission (periods of recovery). Symptoms may vary from mild to severe, and relapses and remissions may last for days or months. More than 80 percent of people who have MS begin with relapsing-remitting cycles.

label: relapsing polychondritis
definition: A chondromalacia that is characterized by recurrent inflammation of cartilage and other tissues throughout the body.

label: Langerhans-cell histiocytosis
definition: A histiocytosis that is characterized by clonal proliferation of Langerhans cells.
exact_synonym: Histiocytosis X | Langerhan's cell histiocytosis | Langerhans cell granulomatosis | Letterer-Siwe disease | Letterer-Siwe disease involving intra-abdominal lymph nodes | Letterer-Siwe disease involving intrapelvic lymph nodes | Letterer-Siwe disease involving intrathoracic lymph nodes | Letterer-Siwe disease involving lymph nodes of axilla and upper limb | Letterer-Siwe disease involving lymph nodes of head, face and neck | Letterer-Siwe disease involving lymph nodes of head, face, and neck | Letterer-Siwe disease involving lymph nodes of inguinal region and lower limb | Letterer-Siwe disease involving lymph nodes of multiple sites | Letterer-Siwe disease involving spleen | Letterer-Siwe disease of intra-abdominal lymph nodes | Letterer-Siwe disease of intrapelvic lymph nodes | Letterer-Siwe disease of intrathoracic lymph nodes | Letterer-Siwe disease of lymph nodes of axilla and upper limb | Letterer-Siwe disease of lymph nodes of axilla and/or upper limb | Letterer-Siwe disease of lymph nodes of head, face and neck | Letterer-Siwe disease of lymph nodes of head, face and/or neck | Letterer-Siwe disease of lymph nodes of inguinal region amd/or lower limb | Letterer-Siwe disease of lymph nodes of inguinal region and lower limb | Letterer-Siwe disease of lymph nodes of inguinal region and/or lower limb | Letterer-Siwe disease of lymph nodes of multiple sites | Letterer-Siwe disease of spleen

label: agammaglobulinemia
definition: A B cell deficiency that is caused by a reduction in all types of gamma globulins.
exact_synonym: IGHM | hypogammaglobulinemia | mu heavy chain deficiency

label: spleen angiosarcoma
definition: An angiosarcoma and hemangioma of intra-abdominal structure and malignant soft tissue neoplasm of the spleen that results_in a nonhematolymphoid malignant neoplasm of the spleen.

label: lymphangiosarcoma
definition: A lymphatic system cancer that has_material_basis_in endothelial cells located_in lymphatic vessels.
exact_synonym: Lymphangiosarcoma of Stewart and Treves | Stewart-Treves syndrome | malignant Lymphangioendothelioma | skin lymphangiosarcoma

label: mushroom workers' lung
definition: An extrinsic allergic alveolitis involving inflammation of the alveoli within the lung caused by hypersensitivity to the inhalation of organic dust particles derived from either the mushrooms, their spores or the compost in which the mushrooms are grown. It is usually caused by the spores of thermophilic actinomycetes.

label: sick building syndrome
definition: An extrinsic allergic alveolitis that is characterized by a set of symptoms such as headache, fatigue, eye irritation, and breathing difficulties that affect workers in modern airtight office buildings. The disease is caused by indoor pollutants (as formaldehyde fumes, particulate matter, or microorganisms), and the symptoms tend to disappear when affected individuals leave the building.

label: hairy cell leukemia
definition: A chronic lymphocytic leukemia that is characterized by over production of B cells (lymphocytes) by the bone marrow where the B cells appear hairy under a microscope.

label: hypersensitivity reaction type IV disease
definition: A hypersensitivity reaction disease that is characterized by a cell-mediated response to antigens, where Th1 helper T cells react with antigens on antigen-presenting cells and cause a delayed type immune response.

label: cryoglobulinemia
definition: A hypersensitivity reaction type IV disease that involves large amounts of cryoglobulins in the blood which become thick or gel-like in cold temperatures.

label: hyperimmunoglobulin syndrome
definition: A B cell deficiency that is characterized by relative predominance of certain immunoglobulin subtypes and deficiencies of others.

label: familial Mediterranean fever
definition: An autoinflammatory disease characterized by recurrent episodes of fever and acute inflammation of the membranes lining the abdomen, joints and lungs; that has_material_basis_in mutations in the MEFV gene, which encodes the protein pyrin.
comment: Xref MGI. OMIM mapping confirmed by DO. [SN].

label: antiphospholipid syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by recurrent venous or arterial thrombosis and/or fetal losses associated with characteristic elevated levels of antibodies directed against membrane anionic phospholipids (anticardiolipin).

label: allergic contact dermatitis
definition: A contact dermatitis that is an allergic skin reaction to foreign chemical or substances leading to red, itchy, weepy reaction where the skin has come into contact with a substance that the immune system recognizes as foreign.

label: food allergy
definition: A hypersensitivity reaction type I disease that is an abnormal response to a food, triggered by the body's immune system.

label: central nervous system lymphoma
definition: A hematologic cancer that has_material_basis_in lymphoma located_in central nervous system.

label: autosomal dominant hyper-IgE syndrome 1 with recurrent infections
definition: A hyper IgE syndrome that has_material_basis_in heterozygous mutation in the STAT3 gene on chromosome 17q21.
exact_synonym: Job syndrome | Job's syndrome | STAT3 Hyper IgE syndrome | hyper IgE recurrent infection syndrome 1 | hyperimmunoglobulin E syndrome
comment: nomenclature update Oct 2024 [LS]. nomenclature update Nov 2025 [claudiasbj].

label: phagocyte bactericidal dysfunction
definition: A primary immunodeficiency disease where phagocytes have a diminished ability to fight bacterial infection.

label: chronic granulomatous disease
definition: A phagocyte bactericidal dysfunction characterized by an inability to resist repeated infectious diseases and a tendency to develop chronic inflammation. Life-threatening recurrent fungal and bacterial infections affecting the skin, lungs, liver, lymph nodes, and bones may occur along with swollen areas of inflamed tissues known as granulomas that can be widely distributed.
exact_synonym: Bridges-Good syndrome | CGD | Congenital dysphagocytosis | Quie syndrome
comment: Xref MGI. OMIM mapping confirmed by DO. [SN].

label: thymoma
definition: A thymus cancer that derives_from epithelial cells located_in the thymus. The tumor cells in a thymoma look similar to the normal cells of the thymus, grow slowly, and rarely spread beyond the thymus.

label: thymus cancer
definition: An immune system cancer located_in the thymus.
exact_synonym: Thymic tumor | neoplasm of thymus | thymic neoplasm

label: thymoma type B
definition: A thymoma that is an epithelial neoplasm arising from the thymus. It may be associated with myasthenia gravis, pure red cell aplasia, and hypogammaglobulinemia.

label: thymic carcinoma
definition: A thymus cancer that derives_from epithelial cells. The tumor cells in a thymic carcinoma look very different from the normal cells of the thymus, grow more quickly, and have usually spread to other parts of the body when the cancer is found.

label: atopic dermatitis
definition: An allergic contact dermatitis that is a chronically relapsing inflammatory allergic response located_in the skin that causes itching and flaking.
exact_synonym: Atopic neurodermatitis | Besnier's prurigo | allergic dermatitis | atopic eczema
comment: Xref MGI. OMIM mapping confirmed by DO. [SN].

label: histiocytosis
definition: A lymphatic system disease that is characterized by an excessive number of histiocytes.
exact_synonym: Hand Schuller Christian disease | chronic Histiocytosis X

label: mixed connective tissue disease
definition: A collagen disease that is considered an overlap of three diseases, systemic lupus erythematosus, scleroderma, and polymyositis with very high titers of circulating antinuclear antibody to a ribonucleoprotein antigen.
exact_synonym: Connective tissue disease overlap syndrome | mixed collagen vascular disease

label: wheat allergy
definition: A food allergy that develops_from exposure to and particularly consumption of wheat, and has_symptom that are both gastrointestinal and nongastrointestinal in nature, such as diarrhea, mouth and throat irritation, headache, hives, skin rashes, and anaphylaxis.
exact_synonym: allergy to wheat | wheat allergic reaction

label: plasmacytoma
exact_synonym: Myeloma - solitary | Myeloma, solitary | Solitary myeloma | Solitary plasmacytoma

label: solitary osseous plasmacytoma
exact_synonym: Isolated osseous plasmacytoma | Solitary plasmacytoma of bone

label: solitary plasmacytoma of chest wall
exact_synonym: Solitary plasmacytoma of the Chest Wall

label: acute allergic sanguinous otitis media
definition: A acute sanguinous otitis media caused by an allergen.

label: photoallergic dermatitis
definition: An allergic contact dermatitis that is characterized by a delayed-type hypersensitivity cutaneous reaction in response to a photoantigen applied to the skin in individuals previously sensitized to the same substance, and has_symptom erythematous papules, vesicles, or eczema.

label: toxicodendron dermatitis
definition: An allergic contact dermatitis that has_allergic_trigger members of the toxicodendron family, including urushiol producing poison ivy, poison oak, and poison sumac, has_symptom pruritic erythematous rash with papules, vesicles, and plaques, and has_material_basis_in a type IV hypersensitivity reaction.
exact_synonym: Contact dermatitis due to Genus Toxicodendron | Rhus dermatitis

label: autoimmune disease
definition: An immune system disease that is an overactive immune response of the body against substances and tissues normally present in the body resulting from an abnormal functioning of the immune system that results in the production of antibodies or T cell directed against the host tissues.
exact_synonym: autoimmune hypersensitivity disease | hypersensitivity reaction type II disease

label: adenoid basal cell carcinoma
definition: A basal cell carcinoma that is characterized by the presence of thin strands of basaloid cells forming a reticulate pattern.

label: epidermolysis bullosa acquisita
definition: An acquired epidermolysis bullosa that is characterized by formation of recurrent blisters secondary to minor trauma in the skin and mucosa, and has_material_basis_in the development of autoantibodies to type VII collagen.

label: Erdheim-Chester disease
definition: A non-Langerhans-cell histiocytosis that is characterized by the proliferation in the tissues of lipid-laden macrophages and the presence of multinucleated giant cells. It results in sclerosis of the long bones and failure of the affected organs.

label: non-Langerhans-cell histiocytosis
definition: A histiocytosis that is characterized by the accumulation of histiocytes that do not meet the phenotypic criteria for the diagnosis of Langerhans cells.

label: myasthenia gravis
definition: An autoimmune disease of the nervous system that has_material_basis_in antibodies to acetylcholine receptors at the neuromuscular junction, has_symptom ptosis, has_symptom diplopia, has_symptom dysphagia, has_symptom dysarthria, has_symptom muscle weakness and has_symptom shortness of breath.

label: Schnitzler syndrome
definition: A hypersensitivity reaction type IV disease that is characterized by chronic urticarial rash and monoclonal IgM gammopathy, has_symptom rash, intermittent fever, arthralgia, and lymphadenopathy.

label: milk allergy
definition: A food allergy that results in adverse immune reaction to one or more of the proteins in cow's milk and/or the milk of other animals, which are normally harmless to the non-allergic individual.

label: egg allergy
definition: A food allergy that is an allergy or hypersensitivity to dietary substances from the yolk or whites of eggs, causing an overreaction of the immune system which may lead to severe physical symptoms.

label: peanut allergy
definition: A legume allergy that is an allergy or hypersensitivity to dietary substances from peanuts causing an overreaction of the immune system which in a small percentage of people may lead to severe physical symptoms.
exact_synonym: allergy to peanuts | peanut allergic reaction

label: nut allergy
definition: A food allergy that develops_from exposure to and particularly consumption of nuts, and has_symptom asthma, skin rashes, throat and eye irritation, and anaphylaxis.
exact_synonym: allergy to nuts | nut allergic reaction

label: autoimmune disease of the nervous system
definition: An autoimmune disease affecting the nervous system.

label: juvenile xanthogranuloma
definition: A non-Langerhans-cell histiocytosis is characterized as a benign skin lump or bump caused by a collection of cells called histiocytes. These may be red, orange or tan at first, but over time may become more yellow in color. These bumps usually appear on the head, neck and trunk.
exact_synonym: Multiple eruptive juvenile xanthogranuloma | Naevoxanthoendothelioma | Xanthoma neviforme

label: allergic rhinitis
definition: A rhinitis that is an allergic inflammation and irritation of the nasal airways involving sneezing, runny nose, nasal congestion, itching and tearing of the eyes caused by exposure to an allergen such as pollen, dust, mold, animal dander and droppings of cockroaches or house dust mites.
exact_synonym: Non-seasonal allergic rhinitis | Perenial allergic rhinitis | atopic rhinitis | hay fever | pollenosis | seasonal allergic rhinitis

label: thymus large cell carcinoma
exact_synonym: large cell carcinoma of the Thymus

label: thymus mucoepidermoid carcinoma
definition: A mucoepidermoid carcinoma located_in the thymus.

label: anti-basement membrane glomerulonephritis
definition: A Goodpasture syndrome that is characterized by damage to only kidney capillaries.

label: lymph node tuberculosis
definition: An extrapulmonary tuberculosis that is located_in lymph node, and has_symptom lymphadenopathy, has_symptom fever, has_symptom weight loss, has_symptom fatigue, has_symptom night sweats and has_symptom cough.
exact_synonym: Tuberculous adenitis | Tuberculous lymphadenopathy | king's evil | scrofula

label: thymus adenocarcinoma
definition: A thymic carcinoma that derives_from epithelial cells of glandular origin.

label: elephantiasis
definition: A lymphedema that is characterised by edema, hypertrophy, and fibrosis of skin and subcutaneous tissues, due to obstruction of lymphatic vessels resulting in the enlargement and hardening of limbs or body parts due to tissue swelling (edema).

label: lymphedema
definition: A lymphatic system disease that is characterized by the abnormal accumulation of lymph fluid in the body's tissues, leading to swelling.

label: chronic inflammatory demyelinating polyradiculoneuropathy
definition: An autoimmune disease of peripheral nervous system that is characterized by inflammation of nerve roots and peripheral nerves and destruction of the fatty protective covering (myelin sheath) over the nerves. This affects how fast the nerve signals are transmitted and leads to loss of nerve fibers.

label: adenoid squamous cell carcinoma
definition: A squamous cell carcinoma that is characterized by a tubular microscopic pattern and keratinocyte acantholysis.
exact_synonym: Acantholytic squamous cell carcinoma | Pseudoglandular squamous carcinoma | adenoacanthoma | adenocarcinoma with squamous metaplasia

label: thymus squamous cell carcinoma
definition: A squamous cell carcinoma that is located_in the thymus.

label: T-cell adult acute lymphocytic leukemia
definition: An adult acute lymphocytic leukemia occurring in adults and that has_material_basis_in T cells.
exact_synonym: Acute Adult T-cell Leukemia-Lymphoma | adult Precursor T Lymphoblastic Leukemia

label: T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia
definition: An acute lymphoblastic leukemia that is characterized by too many T-cell lymphoblasts found in the bone marrow and blood.
exact_synonym: Precursor T Lymphoblastic Leukemia | T Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia | T-cell acute lymphocytic leukaemia | T-cell leukemia | T-cell lymphoblastic leukemia/lymphoma | acute T cell leukemia | precursor T-lymphoblastic lymphoma/leukemia

label: thymus adenosquamous carcinoma
definition: A thymic carcinoma that derives_from squamous cells and gland-like cells.

label: rheumatic pulmonary valve disease
exact_synonym: Rheumatic disease of pulmonary valve | Rheumatic pulmonary incompetence

label: adenosine deaminase deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that is caused by a defective enzyme, adenosine deaminase (ADA), necessary for the breakdown of purines. Lack of ADA causes accumulation of dATP.

label: MHC class II deficiency
definition: A severe combined immunodeficiency that is characterized by deficiency of MHC class II molecules that causes lack of immune protection against bacteria, viruses, and fungi and thus causes early death in childhood, and has_material_basis_in autosomal recessive inheritance of mutation in the CIITA, RFX5, RFXANK, and RFXAP genes.
exact_synonym: BLSII | SCID due to absent class II HLA antigens | bare lymphocyte syndrome type II

label: purine nucleoside phosphorylase deficiency
definition: A combined T cell and B cell immunodeficiency that is a rare autosomal recessive metabolic disorder that has_material_basis_in mutation in the PNP gene and characterized mainly by decreased T-cell function.
exact_synonym: PNP deficiency | Purine-Nucleoside Phosphorylase deficiency | deficiency of inosine phosphorylase

label: cerebral lymphoma
definition: A cerebrum cancer that affects the lymph cells and derives_from the brain.
exact_synonym: brain primary lymphoma | primary Lymphoma of Cerebrum | primary cerebral lymphoma

label: composite lymphoma
definition: A lymphoma that begins in cells of the immune system in which different types of lymphoma cells occur at the same time.

label: gray zone lymphoma
definition: A lymphoma that is characterized by having cellular features of both classic Hodgkin's lymphomas and large B-cell Lymphomas.

label: breast lymphoma
definition: A breast cancer that arises_from lymphocytes.
exact_synonym: Lymphoma of the breast | lymphoma of breast | malignant lymphoma of breast

label: selective IgE deficiency disease
definition: A dysgammaglobulinemia that is characterized by isolated deficiency of IgE and subsequent mildly increased susceptibility to parasitic infections and allergic or autoimmune-related diseases.
exact_synonym: Selective IgE Immunodeficiency | Selective immunoglobulin E deficiency

label: selective immunoglobulin deficiency disease
definition: A B cell deficiency that is characterized by deficiency of an immunoglobulin subtype. The clinical course and prognosis is dependent upon the severity of the selective deficiency and associated morbidity.

label: primary immunodeficiency disease
definition: An immune system disease that results when one or more essential parts of the immune system is missing or not working properly at birth due to a genetic mutation.
exact_synonym: hypoimmunity | immune deficiency disorder | immunodeficiency syndrome

label: reactive arthritis
definition: An arthritis that is an autoimmune disease which develops due to an infection located elsewhere in the body.
exact_synonym: Fiessinger Leroy Reiter syndrome | Post-bacterial arthropathy | Reiter disease | Reiter's disease | postdysenteric arthropathy

label: complement deficiency
definition: A primary immunodeficiency disease that is the result in a mutation of a gene encoding one of the thirty complement system proteins, produced predominantly in liver, which function to defend against infection and produce inflammation.

label: severe combined immunodeficiency
definition: A combined T cell and B cell immunodeficiency that is caused by a defect in infection-fighting immune cells resulting in individuals with non-functional immune systems.
exact_synonym: SCID | combined T and B cell inborn immunodeficiency

label: combined T cell and B cell immunodeficiency
definition: A primary immunodeficiency disease characterized by impaired T cell-mediated immunity and impaired B cell mediated humoral immunity.

label: chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma
definition: A chronic lymphocytic leukemia that is characterized by the presence of immature lymphocytes in the blood and bone marrow and/or in the lymph nodes.
exact_synonym: B-cell lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma | CLL/SLL

label: thymoma type B2
definition: A thymoma type B that is characterized by the presence of neoplastic large, polygonal epithelial cells with large vesicular nuclei and prominent nucleoli.
exact_synonym: Polygonal cell Thymoma | Thymoma, cortical | cortical thymoma

label: plasma cell neoplasm
definition: A mature B-cell neoplasm that is composed of plasma cells.
exact_synonym: Plasma cell dyscrasia | Plasma cell tumour | Plasmacytic tumor

label: leukocyte adhesion deficiency
definition: A combined T cell and B cell immunodeficiency that is characterized by defects affecting how white blood cells respond and travel to the site of a wound or infection affecting the immune system.

label: X-linked hyper IgM syndrome
definition: A hyper IgM syndrome that is characterized by neutropenia and a high rate of gastrointestinal and central nervous system infections and that has_material_basis_in a mutation in the CD40LG gene on chromosome Xq26.3.
exact_synonym: HIGM1 | X-linked hyper-IgM immunodeficiency | XHIM | hyper-IgM immunodeficiency syndrome type 1 | hyper-IgM syndrome 1 | hyper-IgM syndrome type 1 | immunodeficiency with hyper-IgM type 1

label: autoimmune lymphoproliferative syndrome
definition: A hypersensitivity reaction type IV disease that is an inherited disorder in which the body cannot properly regulate the number of immune system cells (lymphocytes). It is characterized by the production of an abnormally large number of lymphocytes. Accumulation of excess lymphocytes results in enlargement of the lymph nodes, the liver, and the spleen.
comment: Xref MGI. OMIM mapping confirmed by DO. [SN].

label: spleen cancer
definition: A lymphatic system cancer that affects white blood cells and involves tumor deposits in the spleen.
exact_synonym: Splenic neoplasm | malignant Splenic tumor | malignant tumour of spleen | spleen neoplasm

label: chest wall lymphoma
definition: A thoracic cancer that is located_in the chest wall.
exact_synonym: Lymphoma of the Chest Wall | chest wall cancer | lymphoma of chest wall | malignant neoplasm of chest wall | malignant tumor of Chest Wall

label: bone lymphoma
definition: A bone cancer and lymphoma by site that results_in lymphoma starting in the bone.
exact_synonym: Lymphoma of the bone | lymphoma of bone

label: systemic juvenile rheumatoid arthritis
definition: A rheumatoid arthritis that involves an autoimmune disease onset in children under 16 which attacks the healthy cells and tissue of located_in joint.
exact_synonym: Pauciarticular onset juvenile chronic arthritis | Still's disease | acute juvenile rheumatoid arthritis | juvenile chronic polyarthritis | juvenile idiopathic arthritis | juvenile rheumatoid arthritis | monarticular juvenile rheumatoid arthritis | pauciarticular juvenile arthritis

label: sternum lymphoma
exact_synonym: Lymphoma of Sternum | lymphoma of the sternum

label: eye lymphoma
definition: A lymphoma by site that is manifested in immune system cells called lymphocytes.

label: B-cell lymphoma
definition: A non-Hodgkin lymphoma that has_material_basis_in B cells.

label: splenic manifestation of hairy cell leukemia
exact_synonym: hairy cell leukaemia of spleen | hairy cell leukemia of spleen | splenic manifestation of hairy cell leukaemia

label: splenic manifestation of leukemia
definition: A leukemia that is located_in the spleen. It results_in an enlargement of the leukemia.

label: refractory hairy cell leukemia
definition: A refractory hematologic cancer that is a mature B cell cancer that does not yield readily to treatment.

label: HCL-V
exact_synonym: Hairy cell leukaemia variant | Hairy cell leukemia variant

label: thymus small cell carcinoma
exact_synonym: small cell carcinoma of the Thymus

label: ankylosing spondylitis
definition: An arthritis that results_in inflammation in the joints of the spine and pelvis. The disease has_symptom pain, has_symptom stiffness in the spine, has_symptom stiffness in the neck, has_symptom stiffness in the hips, has_symptom stiffness in the jaw and has_symptom stiffness in the rib cage.
exact_synonym: Bekhterev syndrome | Bekhterev's disease | Marie-Strumpell disease

label: rheumatoid arthritis
definition: An arthritis that is an autoimmune disease which attacks healthy cells and tissue located_in joint.
exact_synonym: Arthritis or polyarthritis, rheumatic | atrophic Arthritis

label: autoimmune hemolytic anemia
definition: A hemolytic anemia that is characterized by deficient red blood cells caused by auto-antibodies.
exact_synonym: Autoimmune haemolytic anaemia | autoimmune hemolytic anaemia

label: autoimmune thyroiditis
definition: An autoimmune disease of endocrine system that involves inflammation located_in thyroid gland caused by the immune system reacting against its own tissues.
exact_synonym: Chronic Lymphocytic Thyroiditis | Hashimoto thyroiditis | Hashimoto's Disease | Hashimoto's syndrome | Hashimoto's thyroiditis | Lymphocytic Thyroiditis

label: postgerminal center chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma
selective IgD deficiency disease
definition: A selective immunoglobulin deficiency disease that is characterized by low serum levels of IgD immunoglobulins, but is associated with few clinical symptoms.
exact_synonym: Selective IgD Immunodeficiency | Selective immunoglobulin D deficiency

label: chronic NK-cell lymphocytosis
definition: A hypersensitivity reaction type IV disease that is characterized by absolute lymphocytosis of natural killer (CD3- CD16+) cells often with concurrent cytopenia and has_symptom fever, arthralgia, apthous ulcers, vasculitic skin rash, and peripheral neuropathy.

label: lymphatic system disease
definition: An immune system disease that is located_in the lymphatic system.
exact_synonym: Lymphangiopathy | Lymphatic disease | disease of lympoid system | disorder of lymph node and lymphatics | disorder of lymphatic system | disorder of lymphoid system | lymphatic disorder | lympoid system disease

label: epithelial malignant thymoma
exact_synonym: Squamoid Thymoma | Thymoma, epithelial | Well differentiated thymic carcinoma

label: thymus clear cell carcinoma
exact_synonym: Clear cell carcinoma of the Thymus

label: pregerminal center chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma
complement component 5 deficiency
definition: A complement deficiency that is characterized by susceptibility to recurrent bacterial infections especially to infections of enveloped organisms, and has_material_basis_in mutation in the complement component 5 (C5) gene on chromosome 9q33.2 that encodes the fifth component of complenent, a part of the innate immune system.

label: lymph node palisaded myofibroblastoma
definition: A lymph node benign neoplasm that is composed of myoid or myofibroblastic spindle cells, with focal palisading and so-called amianthoid fibers.
exact_synonym: Palisaded Myofibroblastoma of the Lymph Node

label: complement component 3 deficiency
definition: A complement deficiency that is characterized by deficiency of complement component 3 that increases susceptibility to infection and autoimmune diseases and has_material_basis_in autosomal recessive inheritance of mutation in the C3 gene on chromosome 19p13.3, has_symptom recurrent bacterial infections.

label: cork-handlers' disease
definition: An extrinsic allergic alveolitis caused by inhalation of cork dust containing the antigens produced by the fungus Penicillium glabrum. The symptoms include dyspnea, wheezing cough, fever and asthenia.
exact_synonym: Suberosis | cork-handlers' disease or lung | cork-handlers' lung

label: extrinsic allergic alveolitis
definition: An interstitial lung disease involving inflammation of alveoli and smallest airways (bronchioles) of the lung caused by an allergic reaction to inhaled organic dusts containing microorganisms or proteins, and chemicals. Symptoms include chills, cough, fever, malaise, shortness of breath, loss of appetite and weight loss.

label: rheumatoid arthritis interstitial lung disease
definition: An interstitial lung disease that is characterized by the development of pleuroparenchymal disease secondary to rheumatoid arthritis, including pleural effusions, pleural fibrosis, pulmonary vascular disease, and airway complications.

label: bullous pemphigoid
definition: A pemphigoid that is characterized by large blisters.

label: polymyalgia rheumatica
definition: A collagen disease that is characterized by pain, stiffness, and tenderness of the proximal muscle groups including the shoulder, pelvic girdle and the neck.

label: Hodgkin's lymphoma, lymphocytic-histiocytic predominance
exact_synonym: Hodgkin lymphoma, lymphocyte-rich | Hodgkin lymphoma, lymphocytic-histiocytic predominance | Hodgkin's disease, lymphocyte predominance | Lymphocyte Rich Hodgkin's disease

label: Hodgkin's lymphoma
definition: A lymphoma that is marked by the presence of a type of cell called the Reed-Sternberg cell.
exact_synonym: HL | Hodgkin disease | Hodgkin lymphoma | Hodgkin's sarcoma | Hodgkins lymphoma | stage I Subdiaphragmatic Hodgkin Lymphoma | stage II Subdiaphragmatic Hodgkin Lymphoma
comment: Xref MGI. OMIM mapping confirmed by DO. [SN].

label: ulcerative colitis
definition: A colitis that is predominantly confined to the mucosa located_in colon and includes characteristic ulcers, or open sores.

label: Burkitt lymphoma
definition: A mature B-cell neoplasm of B-cells found in the germinal center.
exact_synonym: Burkitt lymphoma/leukaemia | Burkitt's Lymphoma | Burkitt's tumor | Burkitt's tumor or lymphoma | malignant lymphoma, Burkitt's type | small Non-Cleaved cell Lymphoma, Burkitt's type

label: Hodgkin's lymphoma, lymphocytic depletion
exact_synonym: Hodgkin lymphoma, lymphocyte depletion | Hodgkin's disease, lymphocytic depletion | Hodgkin's lymphocytic depletion of unspecified site | Lymphocyte-Depleted Classical Hodgkin Lymphoma

label: lupus erythematosus
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by a constellation of findings that include elevated antibodies to nuclear antigens, antiphospholipids, low complement levels, ulcers, non-scarring alopecia, renal or neurologic damage, and low white blood cell and platelet counts, has_symptom rashes, fatigue, arthritis, hair loss, seizures, and symptoms related to affected organs.

label: tonsil cancer
exact_synonym: malignant Tonsillar tumor | malignant neoplasm of faucial tonsil | malignant neoplasm of palatine tonsil | malignant neoplasm of tonsil, faucial | malignant tumor of tonsil

label: neuromyelitis optica
definition: A central nervous system disease characterized by inflammation of the optic nerve (optic neuritis) and inflammation of the spinal cord (myelitis).

label: psoriasis
definition: A skin disease that is characterized by patches of thick red skin and silvery scales.
comment: Xref MGI. Update outdated UMLS CUI from C00295134 to C0033860.

label: autoimmune thrombocytopenic purpura
definition: A primary thrombocytopenia that involves relatively few platelets in blood as a result of autoantibodies.
exact_synonym: Immune thrombocytopenic purpura | idiopathic thrombocytopenic purpura | primary thrombocytopenic purpura
related_synonym: Ideopath thrombocytopenic pur | Idiopathic purpura | werlhof's disease

label: Waldeyer's ring cancer
exact_synonym: Waldeyer ring cancer | malignant neoplasm of Waldeyer's ring | malignant tumor of Waldeyer's ring

label: psoriatic arthritis
definition: An arthritis that is characterized by joint inflammation that usually occurs in combination with psoriasis.

label: systemic lupus erythematosus
definition: A lupus erythematosus that is an inflammation of connective tissue marked by skin rashes, joint pain and swelling, inflammation of the kidneys and inflammation of the tissue surrounding the heart.
exact_synonym: Lupus Erythematosus, systemic | SLE - Lupus Erythematosus, systemic | disseminated lupus erythematosus

label: visceral leishmaniasis
definition: A leishmaniasis that is the most severe form of the disease caused by protozoan parasites of the Leishmania genus, resulting in the infection of the internal organs such as liver, spleen and bone marrow. The symptoms include fever, weight loss, and an enlarged spleen and liver.

label: pemphigus
definition: An autoimmune disease of skin and connective tissue that is characterized by blistering of the outer layer of the skin and mucous membranes (mouth, nose, throat, eyes, and genitals), causing lesions and blisters that are easily ruptured.

label: splenic tuberculosis
definition: An abdominal tuberculosis that results_in formation of granulomas or abscesses located_in spleen.

label: lymphangitis
definition: A lymphatic system disease that is characterized by inflammation of the lymphatic channels which occurs as a result of infection at a site distal to the channel. It is caused by Streptococcus pyogenes (Group A strep) or Staphylococcus aureus. Lymphangitis is also sometimes called blood poisoning.

label: allergic asthma
definition: An extrinsic asthma that is characterized by symptoms that are triggered by an allergic reaction caused by inhaled allergens such as dust mite allergen, pet dander, pollen and mold. The disease has_symptom coughing, has_symptom wheezing, has_symptom shortness of breath or has_symptom rapid breathing, and has_symptom chest tightness.
exact_synonym: extrinsic asthma with acute exacerbation | extrinsic asthma with status asthmaticus

label: Loeffler syndrome
definition: An eosinophilic pneumonia described as a form of pulmonary eosinophilia characterized as a mild pneumonitis marked by transitory pulmonary infiltration and eosinophilia and usually considered to be an allergic reaction. It can occur in response to a parasitic infection.

label: plasma cell leukemia
definition: A plasma cell neoplasm that is characterized by the presence of a circulating clonal plasma cell count that exceeds 2x10^9/L or is 20% of the leukocyte differential count.
exact_synonym: plasma cell leukaemia | plasmacytic leukaemia | plasmacytic leukemia

label: acute allergic mucoid otitis media
definition: A blue drum syndrome caused by an allergen.

label: type 1 diabetes mellitus
definition: A diabetes mellitus that is characterized by destruction of pancreatic beta cells resulting in absent or extremely low insulin production.
exact_synonym: IDDM | insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus | type I diabetes mellitus
comment: Xref MGI. OMIM mapping confirmed by DO. [SN].

label: Goodpasture syndrome
definition: An autoimmune disease that is characterized by antibody attack of the basement membrane in lungs and kidneys, leading to bleeding from the lungs and kidney failure.
exact_synonym: anti-GBM disease | anti-glomerular basement membrane disease

label: hypersensitivity vasculitis
definition: A hypersensitivity reaction type III disease that is characterized by inflammation and injury to blood vessels and has_symptom purpura, telangiectasia, blistering, urticaria, and ulcers.

label: alopecia areata
definition: An autoimmune disease resulting in the loss of hair on the scalp and elsewhere on the body initially causing bald spots.

label: acute biphenotypic leukemia
definition: An acute leukemia that is characterized by the occurrence of more than one type of leukemia at the same time resulting from either the occurrence of blasts which coexpress myeloid and T or B lineage antigens or concurrent B and T lineage antigens.

label: orbit lymphoma
definition: An orbital cancer that has_material_basis_in some lymphocyte.
